privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.data_collected_body: We collect your name, email, phone number, WhatsApp, date of birth, and country to manage your homologation request. This information is stored securely and encrypted.
privacy.amocrm_body: Once payment is confirmed, your request data (name, contact, service type, documents) is synced with our CRM system (AmoCRM) to manage the homologation process. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
privacy.deletion_body: To request the deletion of your data, contact us. We will process your request within 30 days in accordance with GDPR.

footer.tagline: Your trusted platform for degree homologation and access to education in Spain.

home.hero_subtitle: We accompany you at every step of the homologation process, university access, and Spanish learning. Real-time tracking and direct communication with coordinators.
home.services_subtitle: Complete solutions for your educational process in Spain
home.service_homologacion_desc: We manage the entire process of homologating your university degree with the Spanish Ministry of Education.
home.service_universidad_desc: We help you with admission, selectividad, and enrollment at Spanish universities.
home.service_espanol_desc: Spanish courses for all levels with native and certified teachers.
home.how_subtitle: Four simple steps to your homologation
home.cta_subtitle: Sign up now and take the first step towards your homologation in Spain.

homologacion.hero_subtitle: Professional degree homologation service with the Spanish Ministry of Education. We guide you through every step.
homologacion.what_desc: Homologation is the official recognition of your foreign degree in Spain, allowing you to practice professionally, work, or continue your studies.
homologacion.what_legal_desc: Your degree will have official recognition throughout Spain.
homologacion.what_work_desc: You can practice your profession and access the Spanish job market.
homologacion.what_study_desc: Access master's and postgraduate programs at Spanish universities.
homologacion.doc_1: Original university degree or certified copy
homologacion.doc_2: Academic transcript with grades and credit hours
homologacion.doc_3: Sworn translation of all documents (if not in Spanish)
homologacion.process_1_desc: We review and prepare all your documentation for submission.
homologacion.process_2_desc: We submit your application to the Ministry of Education or Government Delegation.
homologacion.process_3_desc: We continuously track your file status and keep you informed.
homologacion.process_4_desc: You receive your official homologation credential.
homologacion.timeline_desc: The process can take between 6 months and 2 years depending on the type of degree and processing route.
homologacion.cost_desc: Check our pricing page for updated rates on all our services.
homologacion.faq_1_q: How long does the homologation process take?
homologacion.faq_1_a: It depends on the type of degree and processing route. Generally between 6 months and 2 years. We keep you informed at every step.
homologacion.faq_2_q: Do I need sworn translations of my documents?
homologacion.faq_2_a: Yes, all documents not in Spanish must be translated by an official sworn translator.
homologacion.faq_3_q: Can I work while waiting for the resolution?
homologacion.faq_3_a: It depends on your work situation and residence permit. In many cases, it's possible with a conditional registration certificate.
homologacion.faq_4_q: What happens if my homologation is denied?
homologacion.faq_4_a: We analyze the reasons for denial and explore alternatives such as appeals or complementary routes.
homologacion.faq_5_q: What's the difference between homologation and equivalence?
homologacion.faq_5_a: Homologation recognizes your degree as equivalent to a specific Spanish one. Equivalence recognizes a general academic level without a specific title.
homologacion.cta_subtitle: Our team will guide you through the entire process.

universidad.hero_subtitle: We accompany you through the entire admission process: from selectividad to enrollment. Your dream of studying in Spain is closer than you think.
universidad.type_grado_desc: Access to bachelor's programs through high school homologation and selectividad (EBAU/PCE).
universidad.type_master_desc: Direct access to master's programs with your homologated or equivalent degree.
universidad.type_fp_desc: Access to intermediate and higher vocational training programs.
universidad.faq_1_q: Do I need to homologate my high school diploma to access university?
universidad.faq_1_a: In most cases, yes. High school homologation is a prerequisite for taking the Spanish selectividad exam.
universidad.faq_2_a: It's an exam (EBAU or PCE) that allows foreign students to access Spanish universities. We prepare you for the subjects you need.
universidad.faq_3_q: Can I directly access a master's program?
universidad.faq_3_a: Yes, if your university degree is homologated or recognized, you can directly access master's programs.
universidad.faq_4_a: Yes, there are scholarships from the Spanish government, universities themselves, and international organizations. We advise you on available options.
universidad.cta_subtitle: Take the first step towards your academic future.

espanol.hero_subtitle: Spanish classes for foreigners with certified native teachers. From level A1 to C2, online or in person.
espanol.format_individual_desc: Personalized classes at your own pace. Flexible schedule adapted to you.
espanol.format_group_desc: Small groups of 4-8 people. Dynamic and participative environment.
espanol.format_online_desc: Video call classes from anywhere. Same quality as in-person.
espanol.teacher_1_desc: Master's in Spanish as Foreign Language, 8 years experience. DELE preparation specialist.
espanol.teacher_2_desc: Degree in Hispanic Philology. Business Spanish expert.
espanol.teacher_3_desc: Instituto Cervantes certified teacher. Conversational Spanish.
espanol.cta_title: Want to try a free class?
espanol.cta_subtitle: Book your no-commitment trial class and meet our teachers.

consulta.hero_subtitle: Personalized advice on homologation, university admission, and Spanish courses from experienced professionals.
consulta.includes_1: Analysis of your particular case and documentation
consulta.includes_2: Available options based on your profile
consulta.plan_30_desc: 30 minutes by video call. Quick answers and next steps for your case.
consulta.plan_60_desc: 60 minutes with in-depth case analysis, document review, and a personalized action plan.
consulta.form_success_desc: We'll contact you within 24 hours to schedule your consultation.

precios.hero_subtitle: No hidden fees. Choose the plan that best fits your needs.
precios.plan_basico_desc: For those who need basic assistance
precios.plan_completo_desc: The most popular choice among our clients
precios.faq_1_q: When do I have to pay?
precios.faq_1_a: Payment is made once your documentation is reviewed and we confirm we can help. We don't charge upfront without verification.
precios.faq_2_q: What payment methods do you accept?
precios.faq_2_a: We accept credit/debit cards, bank transfer, and Bizum. Payments are processed securely through Stripe.
precios.faq_3_a: Yes, we offer up to 3 interest-free installments for the Complete and Premium plans.
precios.faq_4_a: Our rates include all indicated services. Government fees (from the Ministry) are paid separately directly to the institution.
precios.cta_subtitle: Choose your plan and start today.
